name: Expansion Bundle
description: All-in-one package bundling most Expansion modules. Requires Licensed separately; Animations recommended.
overview:
The Expansion Bundle includes the content of all Expansion mods **except**:

- **DayZ-Expansion-Licensed** — Required to be loaded alongside this mod
- **DayZ-Expansion-Animations** — Not included (recommended but optional)

A feature-rich modification for DayZ that brings many long-awaited features and quality-of-life improvements.

## What's Included

- **Reimagined Chernarus** — Reworked locations with overgrown apocalyptic feel, new interiors/exteriors, and street lights
- **New Vehicles** — Helicopters (MH-6, Merlin, UH1H, Gyrocopter), boats, and ground vehicles (Vodnik, Tractor, etc.)
- **Improved Base Building** — Modular parts that snap in place, helipads, ramps, gunracks, and more
- **Larger Arsenal** — New guns including M9, MP5, MP7, M79, RPG, LAW, MPX, KEDR, M16A4, Benelli M4, and more
- **Airdrops** — Random supply drops with valuable loot
- **Groups/Parties** — Team up, manage your group, see teammates on the map
- **Territories** — Claim and build in your territory, manage members
- **AI System** — Survivor AI with patrols, guards, and factions
- **Market & Trading** — Full trader system with dynamic pricing
- **Quests** — MMO-like quest system with NPC quest givers
- **And much more** — Chat, Navigation, Hardline, Spawn Selection, Personal Storage, Name Tags

> **Tip:** Even when using the bundle, you still need to add the individual mod folder names to your `-mod=` launch parameter.
installation: Subscribe to DayZ-Expansion-Bundle on the Steam Workshop.
Place the @DayZ-Expansion-Bundle folder in your server's root directory.
Add @DayZ-Expansion-Bundle to your -mod= parameter after @CF and @DabsFramework.
Note: You still need @ExpansionLicensed and @ExpansionAnimations separately if needed.
Start the server to generate configuration files for each included module.

troubleshooting.solution: The bundle still generates individual config files per module. Check your server profile folder for each module's settings.
The bundle does not include Expansion Licensed. Subscribe to it separately for vehicle assets.

useCases.title: Quick Setup
useCases.description: Use the bundle for fastest installation — one subscription covers most Expansion modules.

useCases.title: Full Expansion Server
useCases.description: Combine the bundle with Licensed and Animations for a complete Expansion experience.
